description_long: This is a single-story house with a modern ranch-style layout, featuring a combination of brick and white exterior walls. The structure includes a spacious driveway, a wooden deck, and a backyard area with a circular outdoor table and a rectangular swimming pool. Large windows and a bay window are visible, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections slightly raised for architectural interest. The house is surrounded by green lawn patches and enclosed by a low white fence, creating a private residential setting. The main entryway is accessible from the driveway and features a simple, functional design.
description: A modern single-story ranch house with brick and white walls, flat roof, large windows, driveway, deck, pool, and fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entry, brick facade, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and deck.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden deck, circular outdoor table, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the pool, side lawn, and secondary entry points.
description_view_3: View from the driveway side, showing the bay window, main entrance, and a large paved area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a single door, no porch, direct access from driveway, and minimal decorative elements
